extendedTextMessage.text:
𝗖𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡 𝗢𝗙 𝗢𝗪𝗘𝗥𝗥𝗜 𝗦𝗢𝗨𝗧𝗛 𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗢𝗪𝗘𝗥𝗥𝗜 𝗘𝗔𝗦𝗧 𝗙𝗥𝗢𝗠 𝗢𝗪𝗘𝗥𝗥𝗜 𝗙𝗘𝗗𝗘𝗥𝗔𝗟 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗧𝗨𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗬

In this week's plenary, on the floor of the Green Chamber, Hon. Tochukwu Okere(TOSKA), Member, Representing Owerri Federal Constituency recorded another remarkable stride in the service of his people.

In less than three years of his tenure, this Lawmaker has left no stone unturned; from his primary jurisdiction (sponsoring bills, motions and petitions) to human capital development projects, to infrastructure development, to general welfare of his people.

This time, one of the most memorable bills in our history is en route: A Bill for the Creation of Additional Two Local Government Areas in Owerri Federal Constituency). Thanks to the singular efforts of our Destiny Child, Hon. Tochukwu Okere, a man created and preserved for a time like this.

The proposed two LGAs are:

1. Owerri East LGA.
Administrative headquarters -- Agbala.
Villages/communities under its administration:
- Obibiezena Ancient Kingdom
- Emeke Obibiezena
- Amaeze Obibiezena 
- Ulakwo
- Obube
- Egbelu
- Naze
- Emii
- Ezimba
- Agbala
- Mbaoma

2. Owerri South LGA Administrative headquarters -- Ihiagwa
Villages/communities under its administration:
- Umualum
- Umuoma
- Umudibia
- Ihiagwa
- Dindi
- Eziokele
- Okolochi
- Emeabiam
- Umuokpo
- Eziobodo
- Obinze

This is a Bill of Development!

Presenting the bill on the floor of the House of Representatives, Hon. TOSKA emphasized that the purpose of this bill is to draw more resources for developmental purposes to Owerri Federal Constituency.

The passion in which Hon. Okere presented this bill triggered the House to schedule its second reading for next week.

This bill is overdue, and Hon. TOSKA is only doing the Lord's work. As everyone knows, Owerri Federal Constituency is one of the largest Federal Constituencies in South East.

The bill is also a worthy off-shoot and warm up to the proposed new states from the South East that is likely coming to Imo state.

At this juncture, we can only increase our support and prayers for our hardworking Lawmaker. As one Kenyan adage may have it, "A hunter's focus is for the bag." This bill may add to Hon. Okere's towering legacy but its blessings will be evident in the faces of our communities and in our standard of living.

TOSKA all the way.

Toska Media©️

#ToskaImpact
#BillofDevelopment
#Owerri
#ImoState

https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1DpTKn4j3x/
